title: Atomicity router routing decision
description: The single JSON object emitted by atomicity-route.sh on stdout. STABLE CONTRACT for PRSG-008 (FR-011a/FR-011b). Either a success object (route present) or an error object (error present), never both.

route.description: Exactly one route. branch-by-abstraction is RESERVED and MUST NOT be emitted by the MVP (FR-001, SC-008).

releasable.description: false only for destructive-migration or concurrency classes (FR-008); true otherwise (FR-009). Independent of route.

signals.description: Decisive detector findings from the closed controlled vocabulary (FR-011b): the seven hard-atomic / releasability tokens plus the two US1 change-shape routing tokens. May be empty (abstain emits no signal).

hints.description: Advisory-probe output (flag-system, release-cadence, consumer-locality) only (FR-010). MUST NOT contain any signals[] token. May be empty.

warnings.description: Canonical CI-green sentences only (FR-008). May be empty.

enum: destructive migration: a passing CI run does not prove this change is releasable (CI-green ≠ releasable)
concurrency-sensitive change: a passing CI run does not prove this change is releasable (CI-green ≠ releasable)

error.description: Usage or unreadable-input message. Emitted with exit 2. No route key present (FR-011a, FR-012).
